channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scoop: U.S. Sending Dozens of Refueling Planes to Israel as Iran Escalation Looms
item.description: The Trump administration notified Israel it is sending dozens more refueling planes to the country ahead of a potential expansion of military operatio...

item.title: Epstein survivors criticize Blanche meeting as dismissive and demoralizing
item.description: Survivors of Jeffrey Epstein's abuse said a long-awaited meeting with attorney general nominee Todd Blanche felt perfunctory and discouraging.

item.title: China has erased America's lead in AI
item.description: A Chinese breakthrough has matched the advanced AI models that once defined the U.S. frontier, ending America's commanding lead.

item.title: Wildfire smoke makes summer the new smoke season
item.description: Wildfire smoke drifting into cities, as seen in Toronto, is turning summer into a season of hazardous air quality.
